emails.subject: Re: Seattle City Light Deal #458642
emails.body: Re: Seattle City Light Deal #458642 Thanks for checking. I changed this deal to reflect off-peak hours only. Also, Tom Alonso just let me know that deal #460678 actually has a Mid-C delivery point, not Palo Verde. I changed this as well, but wanted to let you know so you can re-confirm. Thanks, Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 11/17/2000 10:20 AM

emails.subject: Seattle City Light Deal #458642
emails.body: Seattle City Light Deal #458642 Hi Kate, I called Seattle City Light to verbally confirm this deal and they said that it should be Off Peak. I spoke with Matt Motley who agreed. Can you change this deal to Off-Peak hours? If you want to check with Matt, that's fine. We're not supposed to make any changes to West deals otherwise I'd do it myself. Thanks! Kim
